title: Triagegeist: Safety-Focused Acuity Support for Emergency Triage
description: A reproducible safety-focused clinical AI case study for emergency triage acuity prediction on synthetic ED data. The project emphasizes dangerous under-triage, high-risk alerting, leakage control, ablations, cross-validation, and transparent limitations.
notes: Raw Triagegeist CSV files are not redistributed in this repository. Users should access the dataset through Kaggle according to the competition terms. This artifact is a research prototype and not a deployable medical device.
